creator: avg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 157641
Canon LiDE 220 support patches

Canon LiDE 220 is a popular flatbed scanner, a development of the older popular Canon LiDE 210.
For several months now this scanner is supported in the upstream repository.  However, it is not clear when the next release is coming given that 1.0.24 was released almost two years ago.
So, I propose to add patches that bring in LiDE 220 support.

The patches are made from the following upstream commits:
http://anonscm.debian.org/cgit/sane/sane-backends.git/commit?id=470594e18b42b8f7f21501e2864d743384abec43
http://anonscm.debian.org/cgit/sane/sane-backends.git/commit/?id=1eb35fe4cb8151a5fd9aa3476ad0cf6932630d2a
